title: Delhi High Court orders Newslaundry to take down content disparaging TV Today, Aaj Tak, India Today
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday ordered digital news and media critique platform Newslaundry to take down certain content that disparage TV Today and its channels Aaj Tak and India Today. The material ordered to be taken down includes those in which Newslaundry referred to certain TV Today content as "shit".A Division Bench of Justices C Hari Shankar and Om Prakash Shukla passed the interim ruling on two connected cross appeals filed by Newslaundry and TV Today.
